query:
SELECT c.*, tc.nome as tipo_nome, tc.descricao as tipo_descricao 
FROM conquistas c 
LEFT JOIN tipos_conquista tc ON c.tipoConquistaId = tc.id
WHERE c.corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%kauan%');
command:
